news.t: Goldman Sachs money manager digs into three themes for long-term growth

holdings.infoBox: GSC is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Moog Inc. stock at 2.37%, Allegro MicroSystems at 2.24%, Veeco Instruments at 1.98%, Cohu, Inc. at 1.96%, and DigitalOcean Holdings at 1.91%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Small Cap Equity ETF (GSC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in small-cap companies. The fund tilts towards US companies but may still invest in securities from other countries, including emerging markets. GSC was launched on Oct 3, 2023 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: Goldman Sachs money manager digs into three themes for long-term growth
data.text: Most exchange-traded funds are passively managed — they are designed to mirror the performance of stock indexes and typically have low management fees. They can work out very well for investors, which...
